docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED APR-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEMPLETON, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-07-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF DINAH BLANSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN TEMPLETON IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE AUGUST HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT JOHN TEMPLETON IS PRESENT. PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
